dj_text: Foster The People - Pumped Up Kicks (Medieval Style | Bardcore) is dead. Long live We Will Rock You [Bardcore]. Or whatever. Got a nice little set going. 5 more after this one.
commercial_text: Tired of coffee that actually tastes good?
hijack_text: Welcome to Corporate Radio MAX from Kosmos Sigma-9.
recovery_text: Frequency stabilized. For now. The walls between kosmos are thin today.
